calendar.name: Calendar
calendar.description: Reads your calendar events and reminders so Magi can understand your schedule, meetings, and daily plans.

enabled.label: Enable
enabled.description: Turn on calendar sync for the timeline.

sync_mode.label: Sync Mode
sync_mode.description: Choose whether calendar sync runs manually or on a schedule.

sync_interval_minutes.label: Scheduled Interval
sync_interval_minutes.description: How often to sync calendar events when scheduled sync is enabled.

lookback_days.label: Lookback Days
lookback_days.description: How many past days to include on first sync.

recurring_expansion_days.label: Future Recurring Event Window
recurring_expansion_days.description: How many future days of recurring events should be prefetched so upcoming repeating events are not missed.

selected_calendars.title: Calendars to Sync
selected_calendars.description: Choose which calendars should be written into the timeline.

activation.title: Connect Calendar
activation.description: Allow Magi to read your calendar events for timeline sync.
